violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee did not wash hands between glove changes in main kitchen.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -2 wet cloths on counters in kiosk kitchen.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Knives stored in sanitizer bucket. Store knife either below 41F or above 140F or wash, rinse and sanitize after every 4 hrs of use or change out.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan cover in walk in cooler.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
